comment.body:
Good morning, after re-reading (once again) carefully (and taking notes on the geopolitical issue in general and all your post), I mentally followed all the logical steps that you were explaining to us yesterday (with high level of passion) ; it’s a cause-and-effect process—if we don’t know the cause, it’s impossible to understand what’s happening. I enjoy reasoning on my own e literally speaking to my self trying to impersonate in politicals and what are the decision that will take (even if unpredictable, but knowing the prob distribution of the events on the table), and now everything is clear. 
What you are giving us is not simply informations,Alma, it is freedom! Freedom of thinking with our mind. Forever grate!

comment.body: Hey @marrom, I realize I had a typo in my reply to you yesterday about the Fib levels (you asked, custom or standard).  I used several of standard Fibs between 0 and 1 (which I believe are the only Fibs, b/c they are just defined mathematical ratios anyway).  0.5, 0.618, 0.786 (typo was in the last one).  Caveat that our esteemed teacher does not rely upon them in her analysis.  I see she is online and can correct me if I am misstating that.  For my part, I often see algo trading bouncing around them, and also think there is some reflexivity b/c many believe in them so I check them sometimes.
comment.raw_body: Hey ${0}, I realize I had a typo in my reply to you yesterday about the Fib levels (you asked, custom or standard).  I used several of standard Fibs between 0 and 1 (which I believe are the only Fibs, b/c they are just defined mathematical ratios anyway).  0.5, 0.618, 0.786 (typo was in the last one).
